title: Automation
body:
# Welcome to Create: Automation
Automation, focused around Create.

## Core Mods
- Create Mod
- Aeronautics
- The Factory Must Grow
- CC: Tweaked (ComputerCraft)

## About
Automation is a simple modpack with a focus on pure automation and create. Build contraptions, make vehicles, extract oil, refine fuel to support high-performance planes, cars, and more!
